name: vibe-check-mcp
description: Stop AI coding disasters before they cost you weeks. Real-time anti-pattern detection for vibe coders who love AI tools but need a safety net to avoid expensive overengineering traps.

agent_c_star.comment: 433 findings: 1 critical, 80 high, 181 medium, 171 low. Obfuscation detected!. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 10. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 10/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 433 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.

pm_override.reason: PM override: Vibe-check-mcp is an anti-pattern detection/security tool for AI coders. 1 injection finding across 302 files in a security-focused tool is consistent with test fixtures or defensive detection code (known FP pattern from Verification Run 2 — security testing libraries contain attack payloads as fixtures). 3 obfuscation across 302 files is negligible (0.01 per file). Tool purpose is security enforcement, not exploitation. Low real risk despite injection finding.
